prompt: Make this portrait a full body portrait. Output the image as in 9:16 aspect ratio.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, a colorful, abstract, and painterly artwork. Extend the portrait downwards to transform it into a full-body portrait of the depicted subject. The new content should seamlessly integrate, matching the distinctive artistic style of image 1. The final output image must have a 9:16 aspect ratio, with the original head and shoulders from image 1 positioned in the upper section.
